name: explicit readiness gate
prompt: Check whether this gaming PC is ready for the Skillful RAN OCUDU campaign before we build anything.

name: docker reachability
prompt: Run the OCUDU PC readiness check and tell me if Docker and Compose are usable.

name: storage headroom
prompt: Audit disk and RAM headroom before the OCUDU container build stages.

name: strict readiness
prompt: Use strict readiness mode so any blocker fails the OCUDU PC checkpoint.

name: negative build env
prompt: Build the pinned Docker images for the srsRAN Project and srsUE stages.

name: negative project build
prompt: Clone srsRAN Project release_25_10 and build it in .local/ocudu.

name: negative local runtime
prompt: Run the split CU DU local lane for 60 seconds.

name: negative packaging
prompt: Promote these candidate notes into a tracked skill.
